items.name: SKILL.md
items.criterion: YAML frontmatter + Contract + Phases + Output Format

items.name: deterministic_code
items.criterion: scripts/*.py runs as CLI without LLM call

items.name: cross_modal_eval
items.criterion: DEFERRED in Hermes — substitute /advice adversarial review (cited in references/)

items.name: integration_tests
items.criterion: tests invoke shipped script on live skill tree

items.name: resolver_trigger_entry
items.criterion: RESOLVER.md has ## <skill> heading with triggers on the SAME line

items.name: check_resolvable
items.criterion: scripts/check_resolvable.py with argparse CLI reading LIVE resolver + skills dir

items.name: brain_filing
items.criterion: Conditional — required only when skill writes to brain pages
